case_title: WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART VS. CLARENCE JAMES HARDY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW FOR PLAINTIFF TO TIMELY SUBMIT A REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DINUSHI GUNARTNE COLLECTIONS REP., VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT CLARENCE JAMES HARDY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DINUSHI GURNARATNE, LEGAL COLLECTIONS AGENT. DEFENDANT CLARENCE JAMES HARDY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF $2635.50 TO BE PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF IN SEVEN PAYMENTS. SIX PAYMENTS OF $400 WILL BE PAID BY THE 27TH OF EACH MONTH. THE SEVENTH PAYMENT FOR 235.50 WILL BE PAID ON MARCH 27TH 2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-29-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR TWO MONTHS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE APRIL 2022. AT WHICH TIME IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
